Net-outcome estimate, not a "tax saved" headline: it nets the income-tax and GST benefit of an FBT-exempt EV (under the LCT threshold) against the financier's higher effective interest (~8–12%), management fees and the residual paid at lease end. Indicative only — not financial advice. Get a real quote and model your own position before deciding.

For you

More than a cheaper car.

Charge at home for less

A smart charger on Cable's flat rate is the cheapest, most convenient place to fuel. Plug in overnight, wake up full, pay a fraction of petrol.

Your home bill drops too

Move the whole house onto Cable and the same flat, 3-year-guaranteed rate cuts your household power 20–40% — included in the bundle.

It leaves when you do

The lease is yours, not your employer's. Change jobs and it travels with you. No lock-in to a desk, no awkward exit.

How it works

Three steps. We handle the rest.

1

Pick your EV

Choose any eligible electric car. We lock the price and set up a novated lease paid from your gross salary — before tax.

2

Bundle your energy

Switch your home electricity to Cable in a couple of taps and we set up smart charging. Your car and home run on one plan.

3

Save automatically

Lease, insurance, charging and energy come out of one pre-tax deduction. We optimise your charging to cut the bill further.

Smart charging

Charging costs, handled automatically.

Your home charging cost is automatically calculated and packaged into your lease — paid from your salary before tax. Cable's battery-smart platform charges your car when power is cheapest and cleanest, so you fuel up for a fraction of petrol with nothing to track.

Auto-calculated, pre-tax

We work out your charging cost and fold it into your salary-packaged lease — no separate bill, no receipts.

Charged at the cheapest hours

The platform shifts charging to off-peak, low-price, low-carbon windows, automatically.

One flat rate, three years

Charging runs on Cable's flat 24/7 rate, guaranteed — so your running cost stays predictable.

For employers

A benefit your team loves, at $0 cost to the business.

Give your people a $4–5k/year benefit that costs you nothing and takes minutes to set up. Cable and our leasing partner run everything end-to-end.

No cost, no liability

$0 to the business. You approve a pre-tax payroll deduction — we handle leasing, energy, charging and support.

Live in ~15 minutes

One agreement, a recurring payroll line, an FBT-nil return your system generates automatically. That's it.

Keep your best people

A standout benefit that strengthens recruiting and retention — without adding cost or admin.

Cut Scope 3 emissions

Every EV that replaces a petrol car lowers your reported emissions and supports your sustainability targets.

Book a 20-min walkthrough →
Questions

No surprises. That's the pitch.

Yes. The lease is funded from your pre-tax salary and the employer's payroll-tax position is kept neutral. There's no scheme to license and no cost line for the business.

Battery-electric vehicles priced under the luxury-car-tax threshold for fuel-efficient vehicles qualify for the FBT exemption on novated leases, which is what lets the whole cost come out pre-tax. We confirm eligibility before you commit.

No — you can take just the car. But bundling Cable home energy and smart charging is where the extra savings and the one-bill simplicity come from, so most people do.

We check your charging situation up front. If a home charger isn't feasible, we'll route you to public or workplace charging options so you're not stuck — and you can still lease the car.

Your lease and energy plan move with you. As long as your new employer can run a pre-tax payroll deduction, we transfer it across.

Drive electric. Save twice. Start today.

See your numbers in a few minutes, or talk to us about offering Cable Car to your team.

The headline figure shows gross pre-tax savings; wire to a real novated + energy quoting engine and have all FBT/GST claims reviewed before any public use.
